  "findings": [
    "Slings are rigged over unprotected edges, creating an immediate risk of cutting, tearing, or catastrophic failure of the rigging under load."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all lifting operations immediately.",
    "Lower the load if suspended, or secure it in place.",
    "Install edge protection, softeners, or wear pads between the slings and the sharp edges before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Rigging slings must be protected from sharp or abrasive edges of the load to prevent damage and potential failure. Operating with unprotected edges violates basic safety standards and manufacturer specifications, posing a critical safety hazard.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.9",
    "OSHA 1926.251(c)(9)"
  ]
